mapper.select:
select count(1) from km_document d where d.document_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' and d.is_deleted = 0
and d.kb_id = #{kbId}

select d.id as doc_id, d.kb_id, kb.name as kb_name, d.file_name as original_name, d.document_status as status, (select count(1) from km_document_chunk c where c.doc_id = d.id and c.is_active = 1) as chunk_count from km_document d left join km_knowledge_base kb on d.kb_id = kb.id where d.id = #{docId} and d.is_deleted = 0
select tag_name from km_document_tag where doc_id = #{docId} order by id asc
select document_status from km_document where id = #{docId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update km_document set document_status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{docId} and is_deleted = 0
